strategy_summary: The composite mesoglea of jellyfish and sea anemones provides structural support using collagen fibers in a complex gel matrix. “Then there’s the jelly of jellyfish and sea anemones (mesoglea), made up of sparse collagen fibers in a complex gel matrix.” (Vogel 2003:305)
mechanism:
The composite mesoglea of jellyfish and sea anemones provides structural support using collagen fibers in a complex gel matrix.

“Then there’s the jelly of jellyfish and sea anemones (mesoglea), made up of sparse collagen fibers in a complex gel matrix.” (Vogel 2003:305)
